name: Fiscal Deficit
description: The fiscal deficit is the gap between what the central government spends and what it earns, as a share of GDP. India has been on a multi-year consolidation path down from the pandemic-era peak, a trajectory the Union Budget tracks closely each year.
source: Controller General of Accounts, Union Budget documents
releaseSchedule: Full-year figures released after the fiscal year closes (April–March); revised estimates given in each Budget.

chart.title: A steady post-pandemic consolidation
chart.subtitle: Fiscal deficit, % of GDP, by fiscal year
